qc.notes: Mesmerizing-vista channel: ONE continuous ultra-slow camera move per shot is the INTENDED style — do NOT flag slow drift, heavy fog, haze, dusk gloom or dreamlike scale as defects. FAIL only on real rendering errors: broken/shattered geometry, glitch or duplicated frames, warped/melting structures, malformed vehicles, animals or human figures, readable close-up faces, sudden cuts or speed jumps, burned-in text/logos/watermarks.

art_style: Photorealistic cinematic vista shot on anamorphic 35mm film — one single continuous ultra-slow camera move through a world of impossible scale, razor-sharp hyper-detailed 4K clarity. Colossal subjects rendered believable, contrasted with tiny warm human-scale details: lit windows, distant vehicles, chimney smoke, small lantern lights. Cool desaturated base palette of slate blue, teal and lavender fog, pierced by one warm amber-gold light source. Heavy atmosphere: volumetric fog, storm haze, dusk glow, drifting mist, deep atmospheric perspective. Soft cinematic lighting, gentle anamorphic flare, subtle 35mm film grain. Serene, awe-filled, hopeful mood — never dark or dystopian. Smooth constant motion, no cuts, no speed changes, no on-screen text, no watermark, no captions, vertical 9:16 composition.
